title: lotononis stenophylla
intro: Lotononis stenophylla, also known as the "Stink Bush" due to its strong and unpleasant smell, is a plant species native to southern Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lotononis stenophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
